strategy_summary: Nest of tropical hornet sheds water via conical roof. “The conical shape of the [nest of the] tropical hornet Vespa affinis leads rain water efficiently away from the nest.” (Pallasmaa 1995:12)
mechanism:
Nest of tropical hornet sheds water via conical roof.

“The conical shape of the [nest of the] tropical hornet Vespa affinis leads rain water efficiently away from the nest.” (Pallasmaa 1995:12)
